subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Akbar! Unto God be all praise, all gratitude and all glory, inasmuch as He hath guided thee and made thee attain unto the fruits [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی اکبر لله الحمد و له الشکر و الثناء چه که آنجناب را راه نمود و باثمار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
